activity_types_check.name: activity_types_check
activity_types_check.value: "activity_types"."n_spark" > 0 and "activity_types"."n_warm" >= 0 and "activity_types"."p_min" > 0 and "activity_types"."options_cap" > 0 and "activity_types"."restall_interest" >= 0 and "activity_types"."restall_days" >= 0 and "activity_types"."max_time_retries" >= 0 and "activity_types"."base_h3_res" between 0 and 15 and "activity_types"."per_user_weekly_cap" >= 0 and "activity_types"."ignore_decay_windows" >= 0
